highlights.text: I also wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is that ES can hold 6592 though (or quick trap below).
The catch though, is they only occur when my core setup - the Failed Breakdown - triggers.
ES plunged to 6353 last evening going elevator down .
An alternative is to wait for it to flush and recover (perhaps to 6353) for a Failed Breakdown.” We got this trigger at 830pm Monday evening, and were off to 6647 Wednesday high of day.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow
This is a good support in its own right but instead of buying it direct (you can, but its riskier) wait for 6525 to hold and recover 6530.” By 930AM, we had recovered 6530, and the rip began.

post_title: Bulls Bought The Dip Today In SPX. Can They Run It Now? April 6 Plan
